title: pimelea heterophylla
intro: Pimelea heterophylla, also known as the Rough Bush-pea, is a plant species native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. Pimelea heterophylla is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
